records.question: Which storms named One caused at least 13.0 million USD in damage with zero deaths, had a max speed of at most 995, and affected Afghanistan (region code AF)?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT storm.storm_id FROM storm
JOIN affected_region ON storm.storm_id = affected_region.storm_id
JOIN region ON affected_region.region_id = region.region_id
WHERE storm.damage_millions_usd >= 13.0 AND region.region_name = 'Afghanistan' AND storm.number_deaths = 0 AND storm.name = 'One' AND storm.max_speed <= 995 AND region.region_code = 'AF'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT storm.Storm_ID 
FROM storm 
JOIN affected_region ON storm.Storm_ID = affected_region.Storm_ID 
JOIN region ON affected_region.Region_id = region.Region_id 
WHERE storm.Damage_millions_USD >= 13.0 
AND storm.Number_Deaths = 0 
AND storm.Name = 'One' 
AND storm.Max_speed <= 995 
AND region.Region_name = 'Afghanistan' 
AND region.Region_code = 'AF'

records.question: What storms named Five had a maximum speed of at least 988, caused at least 1.49 million dollars in damage, and resulted in at least 3 deaths?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT storm.storm_id FROM storm
WHERE storm.max_speed >= 988 AND storm.damage_millions_usd >= 1.49 AND storm.number_deaths >= 3 AND storm.name = 'Five'
records.pred_sql: SELECT storm.Storm_ID FROM storm WHERE Max_speed >= 988 AND Damage_millions_USD >= 1.49 AND Number_Deaths >= 3 AND Name = 'Five'

records.question: Which storms named One that were active from May19–May25 caused exactly 13.0 million USD in damage, had a maximum speed of at least 995, resulted in no more than 0 deaths, and affected at least 10 cities?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT storm.storm_id FROM storm
JOIN affected_region ON storm.storm_id = affected_region.storm_id
WHERE affected_region.number_city_affected >= 10.0 AND storm.number_deaths <= 0 AND storm.max_speed >= 995 AND storm.name = 'One' AND storm.damage_millions_usd = 13.0 AND storm.dates_active = 'May19–May25'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT storm.Storm_ID 
FROM storm 
JOIN affected_region ON storm.Storm_ID = affected_region.Storm_ID 
WHERE storm.Number_Deaths <= 0 
AND storm.Max_speed >= 995 
AND storm.Name = 'One' 
AND storm.Damage_millions_USD = 13.0 
AND storm.Dates_active = 'May19–May25' 
AND affected_region.Number_city_affected >= 10.0

JOIN region ON affected_region.region_id = region.region_id

AND affected_region.Number_city_affected >= 22.0

records.question: Which storms caused at least 52 deaths in the affected regions?

WHERE storm.number_deaths >= 52

records.question: Which storms have a maximum speed of at most 972 and affected any region?

JOIN region ON affected_region.region_id = region.region_id
WHERE storm.max_speed <= 972

records.question: Which storms caused exactly 10.75 million dollars in damage and had a maximum speed of at most 972?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT storm.storm_id FROM storm
WHERE storm.max_speed <= 972 AND storm.damage_millions_usd = 10.75
